description: This file defines a singly linked list implementation with basic functionalities such as add, remove, get, and size, including internal Node class and utility functions.

classes.name: LinkedList
classes.description: A singly linked list implementation supporting add, remove, get, and size operations.

classes.name: LinkedList.Node
classes.description: Inner class representing a node in the linked list, holding string data and a reference to the next node.

methods.name: add
methods.description: Adds a new element to the end of the list.

methods.name: remove
methods.description: Removes the first occurrence of the specified element from the list.

methods.name: size
methods.description: Returns the number of elements in the list.

methods.name: get
methods.description: Retrieves the element at the specified index.

methods.name: unlink
methods.description: Internal method to unlink a node from the list.

methods.name: tail
methods.description: Static method to find the last node of the list starting from head.
